entries.current_position: RP-C01, RP-C05, RP-C06, and RP-C07 are COMPLETE. AJ-01 through AJ-12 are PROVEN. RP-C08 and Repairing Prime remain IN_PROGRESS for final generated-current proof, whole-Quest Strikeforce, Quest Board and continuity closeout, Phoenix recovery, and restart-safe Sunset.

entries.next_action: After separate permanence for this CAP-027 reconciliation and generated-current readback, prepare the independent whole-Quest Strikeforce without promoting the Quest to COMPLETE.
entries.next_approval: Jayson must separately authorize this reconciliation's ready and merge transactions, any generated checkpoint permanence, and the later whole-Quest Strikeforce and closeout gates.

entries.current_position: FS-C01-M01, M02, and M03 are PROVEN. The ledger, receipts, lifecycle binding, recovery, rollback planning, exact-head CI, and canonical synthetic exercise are accepted; M04 live acceptance remains unproven. The future FS-C03 Seon macOS bridge vessel is Hermes; Apollo is no longer reserved for that bridge role.

entries.next_action: Await a separately authorized Jayson-selected protected store and one bounded trusted provider/runtime usage receipt, then execute FS-C01-M04 without widening the accepted construction boundary.

entries.current_position: PF-C01-M01 is PROVEN_WITH_CARRY_FORWARD. Apollo is the fixed Windows evacuation target, Hermes is the portable independent command route, and Iris is a nonblocking companion endpoint. PF-C01-M02 remains READY_FOR_PREVIEW.

Windows-specific Codex continuity has not yet been evacuated from Prometheus to Apollo.
The independent Hermes portable command and administration route has not yet received mission evidence.
Windows recovery media, system-image disposition, and manufacturer-driver preservation remain unresolved.
Extended memory testing and bounded stability follow-up remain pending.
